title: In exercise of the powers conferred by section 38A of the Cost and Work Accountants Act,1959
description: In exercise of the powers conferred by section 38A of the Cost and Work Accountants Act,1959

(I) Theserulesmay be called the Cost and Works Accountants Procedure of Meeting of Quality' Review Board and Terms and Conditions of Services and Allowances of the Chairperson and Members of the Board (Amendment) Rules, 2012. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In rule 2 of the Cost and Works Accountants Procedure of Meeting of Quality Review Board and Terms and Conditions of Services and Allowances of Chairperson and Members of the Board Rules, 2006, in clause (d), the Words “and Works” shall be omitted. [F.No. 12/11/20! 1-PI] MANOJ KOMAR, Jt. Secy. HH Rth4[ -4 fqRR 4 H HT-ftrHR (2) 4 “ HR Th4 ’ ’ 7 PR 1 Hl 4) 4 fHHl HR'II I 4. a hi P1 q 4t 4> y<d4 1 4, hr 4<sri'h i nt htr4 h) rfRfe 411 hr 4*4 '' 7i«4 hi <4)q Ihri hrtt i [HT. 4. 12/11/201 FRHtT^] OOH RiHK, R^HI R[4r HHOT :—"JJRf Add, RRrf °4 <1-44y, HHIRRRl, HR! 11, (2IS 3, HR-Tsfe (i) 4 HT.HI.f4. 112(H), HRs! 27 H7h4, 2007 ?KI HHtRm fHTT rpr | | Part II—Sec. 3(i)] NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 24th September, 2012 G.S.R.713 (E).- In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 38A of the Cost and Works Accountants Act, 1959 (23 of 1959), the Central Government hereby makes the following rules further to amend the Cost and Works Accountants (Procedure of Investigations of Professional and Other Misconduct and Conduct of Cases) Rules, 2007, namely:— 1. (1) These rules may be called the Cost and Works Accountants (Procedure of Investigations of Professional and Other Misconduct and Conduct of Cases) (Amendment) Rules, 2012. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Cost and Works Accountants (Procedure of Investigation of Professionals and other Misconduct and Conduct of Cases) Rules, 2007 (hereinafter referred to as the said rules), in sub-rule (1) of rule 2, in clause (f), the words “and Works” shall be omitted. 3. In Rule 4 of the said rules, in sub-rule (2), the words “and Works” shall be omitted. 4. In FORM I of the said rules, in the entry against serial number I, the words “and Works” shall be omitted. [F.No. 12/11/2011-PI) MANOJ KUMAR, Jt. Secy. Note:— The principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part 11, Section 3, Sub-section (i) vide G.S.R. 112(E), dated the 27th February, 2007.
